description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit featuring six evenly spaced wooden shelves supported by a sturdy metal frame. The shelves have a natural wood grain finish, providing a warm contrast to the cool, industrial look of the metal supports. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying a variety of items. The frame consists of four vertical metal posts connected by horizontal bars at the top and bottom, ensuring stability. The overall construction appears robust, ideal for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no doors, drawers, or visible handles, emphasizing its open and accessible structure.
description: A tall, open shelving unit with six wooden shelves and a metal frame, designed for accessible storage or display. The combination of wood and metal gives it a modern, industrial appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six wooden shelves framed by metal supports, with open access to each shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the continuous wood grain pattern along the shelf edges.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with visible metal frame and open shelf design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the shelf depth and wood grain, with no back panel present.
